mapper.select: SELECT u.id, u.student_no AS studentNo, u.nickname, u.avatar, u.bio, u.created_at AS createdAt, COALESCE(p.post_count, 0) AS postCount, COALESCE(p.like_count, 0) AS likeCount FROM "user" u LEFT JOIN ( SELECT author_id, COUNT(*) AS post_count, SUM(like_count) AS like_count FROM post WHERE deleted = 0 AND status = 1 GROUP BY author_id ) p ON u.id = p.author_id WHERE u.id = #{id} AND u.deleted = 0

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT author_id) FROM ( SELECT author_id FROM post WHERE created_at >= NOW() - (#{days} || ' days')::INTERVAL UNION SELECT author_id FROM comment WHERE created_at >= NOW() - (#{days} || ' days')::INTERVAL ) t
